prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 17 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Alzheimer's Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 76.9 kg; Height 170.8 cm; BMI 26.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.0%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 261mg/dL; 9 months ago 231mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 178mg/dL; current 166mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 76.7kg; 9 months ago 75.1kg; 6 months ago 73.9kg; 3 months ago 72.8kg; current 76.9kg), Height (12 months ago 170.8cm; 9 months ago 170.8cm; 6 months ago 170.8cm; 3 months ago 170.8cm; current 170.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 26.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 138mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 123U/L; 9 months ago 123U/L; 6 months ago 121U/L; 3 months ago 129U/L; current 127U/L), AST (12 months ago 102U/L; 9 months ago 95U/L; 6 months ago 92U/L; 3 months ago 94U/L; current 99U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 16mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; current 12mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 1177mg/g; 9 months ago 1264mg/g; 6 months ago 1341mg/g; 3 months ago 1054mg/g; current 877mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 69mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 118mg/dL; 6 months ago 131mg/dL; 3 months ago 137mg/dL; current 125mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.3g/dL; 3 months ago 10.1g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
